path_policy.note: All document paths, related references, and routing targets remain relative so the whole documentation folder can be moved without rewriting the manifest.

pods-docs.description: GPU pod orchestration, vLLM deployment recipes, and Pi planning documents.
preferred_when: The query is about serving large models on GPU pods or specific vLLM flags.
The query mentions DataCrunch, Vast.ai, RunPod, H100/H200/B200 sizing, or model deployment commands.

coding-agent-docs.description: Pi coding-agent runtime, configuration, extension, SDK, TUI, protocol, and platform documentation.
preferred_when: The query is about pi itself, its SDK, extensions, sessions, settings, keybindings, providers, or protocols.
The query mentions createAgentSession, pi.registerTool, models.json, auth.json, /tree, or --mode rpc/json.

mom-docs.description: Mom bot sandboxing, integration, events, and redesign architecture documents.
preferred_when: The query is about Mom, Slack integration, event files, sandboxing, artifacts, or platform adapters.
The query mentions workspace/events, docker sandbox, v86, Socket Mode, or PlatformAdapter.

routing_rules.why: The coding-agent models doc is about declarative provider/model configuration, not GPU sizing.
The pods models doc is the hardware and vLLM-args matrix.
providers.md is the user-facing auth and credential-resolution reference.
custom-provider.md is the extension-author guide for implementing providers.
rpc.md defines the full bidirectional subprocess protocol.
json.md documents the simpler unidirectional event-stream mode.
session.md is the persisted data-model reference.
tree.md is the user-facing and API-facing branch-navigation guide.
compaction.md is the summarization and token-budget behavior reference.
plan.md is the behavioral/product plan, not the file-by-file implementation checklist.
implementation-plan.md is the engineering work-breakdown document.
events.md is the dedicated event-system design.
new.md is the broad multi-platform redesign proposal.
sandbox.md is the operational Docker guide; v86.md is an evaluation of an alternative sandbox.

documents.title: Kimi-K2 Deployment Guide
documents.summary: Detailed deployment recipes for Kimi-K2 across vLLM, SGLang, KTransformers, and TensorRT-LLM, including multi-node serving and tool-calling setup.

documents.title: JSON Event Stream Mode

Shortest protocol doc; no stdin command definitions

confusable_with.difference: RPC mode is bidirectional and command-driven; JSON mode only streams events.
